step_rationale: Oxidized cholesterol products marking oxidative modification of retained lipids; atherogenesis initiator and plaque severity biomarker.
mechanism: Oxysterols are biomarkers and drivers of ApoB-lipoprotein oxidation, the initiating substrate of atherosclerotic plaque formation and destabilization.

references.title: Oxysterols in Vascular Cells and Role in Atherosclerosis.
references.journal: Advances in experimental medicine and biology

references.title: Accumulation of oxysterols in the erythrocytes of COVID-19 patients as a biomarker for case severity.
Cholesterol Acceptors Regulate the Lipidome of Macrophage Foam Cells.
